steps.title: Discovery & Consultation

steps.title: Construction Phase

steps.title: Completion & Handover

about.title: About Us
about.metaTitle: About BuildRight Construction | Our Story & Mission
about.metaDescription: Learn about BuildRight Construction's 25-year journey, our commitment to quality, safety-first culture, and the team behind our award-winning projects.

content.headline: Building More Than Structures
content.subheadline: For 25 years, we've been building trust, relationships, and communities through exceptional construction

content.heading: Humble Beginnings
content.text: BuildRight Construction started as a small family-owned business with just three employees and a single backhoe. Founder James Richardson had a vision: to build not just structures, but lasting relationships with clients based on trust, transparency, and exceptional quality.

content.heading: Growth & Excellence
content.text: Over two decades, we've grown into a leading construction company with 150+ team members and a portfolio of 500+ completed projects. Despite our growth, we've never lost sight of our founding principles: quality first, safety always, and customer satisfaction above all.

content.heading: Today & Tomorrow
content.text: Today, BuildRight is recognized as an industry leader in sustainable construction practices and innovative building solutions. As we look to the future, we remain committed to building excellence while embracing new technologies and environmentally responsible practices.

content.title: Our Core Values
content.subtitle: The principles that guide every project we undertake

values.title: Quality Without Compromise
values.description: We never cut corners. Every material, every technique, every finish meets or exceeds industry standards and our own rigorous quality benchmarks.

values.title: Safety Above All
values.description: Every team member returns home safely every day. Our comprehensive safety program has earned us recognition from OSHA and industry safety organizations.

values.title: Integrity in Everything
values.description: Transparent pricing, honest timelines, and clear communication. We believe trust is earned through consistent, ethical behavior on every project.

values.title: Sustainable Innovation
values.description: We embrace green building practices and innovative technologies that reduce environmental impact while delivering superior results.

content.title: Meet the Experts
content.subtitle: Our leadership team brings decades of combined experience from the world's top construction and engineering firms

members.name: James Richardson
members.bio: With 25 years of construction management experience including a decade as VP at Turner Construction, James leads BuildRight with a focus on innovation, safety, and sustainable growth. He holds an MBA from Wharton and is a LEED AP certified professional.

members.name: Maria Santos
members.bio: Maria brings 20 years of expertise in large-scale commercial and industrial projects. Previously Director of Operations at Skanska, she oversees all project execution with a focus on efficiency and excellence. She holds a Master's in Construction Management from MIT.

members.name: David Park
members.bio: David is a licensed structural engineer with 20+ years designing complex industrial and commercial structures. His innovative engineering solutions have been featured in Engineering News-Record. He holds a Ph.D. in Structural Engineering from Stanford.

members.name: Jennifer Walsh
members.bio: Jennifer manages BuildRight's financial operations with expertise in construction accounting and project financing. She previously served as CFO at a major real estate development firm and holds an MBA from Harvard Business School.

members.name: Carlos Mendez
members.bio: Carlos is a certified safety professional (CSP) with 15 years of construction safety experience. He has implemented our award-winning safety program that has maintained a zero lost-time incident record for over 5 years.

members.name: Amanda Foster
members.bio: Amanda leads our green building initiatives and sustainability programs. She is a LEED Fellow and has helped certify over 50 sustainable construction projects. She holds a Master's in Sustainable Design from UC Berkeley.

content.title: Industry Recognition
content.subtitle: Our commitment to excellence has been recognized by industry organizations and publications

content.subtitle: We maintain the highest industry certifications and professional memberships

content.headline: Comprehensive Construction Services
content.subheadline: From concept to completion, we deliver excellence across residential, commercial, and industrial construction projects

content.title: What We Build
content.subtitle: Full-spectrum construction services tailored to your unique requirements

services.title: Custom Home Construction
services.description: Build your dream home with our custom residential construction services. From luxury estates to modern townhouses, we bring your vision to life with premium materials and expert craftsmanship. Our in-house architects and designers work with you to create a home that perfectly matches your lifestyle and preferences.

services.title: Commercial Construction
services.description: We deliver commercial spaces that drive business success. From office buildings and retail centers to mixed-use developments, our commercial construction services combine functional design with aesthetic excellence. We understand the unique requirements of commercial projects including strict timelines and minimal disruption to ongoing operations.

services.title: Industrial Construction
services.description: Our industrial construction expertise spans manufacturing plants, warehouses, distribution centers, and specialized facilities. We understand the complex engineering requirements and regulatory compliance needed for industrial projects. Our team includes specialists in heavy machinery foundations, clean room construction, and automated facility integration.

services.title: Renovation & Remodeling
services.description: Transform existing spaces with our comprehensive renovation services. Whether updating a kitchen, adding a room, or completely renovating a commercial property, we handle everything from design to final finishes. We work efficiently to minimize disruption and deliver results that exceed expectations.

services.title: Green Building & Sustainability
services.description: Build responsibly with our sustainable construction services. We are LEED-certified professionals who specialize in energy-efficient design, eco-friendly materials, and green building practices. Reduce your environmental footprint while enjoying lower operating costs and healthier indoor environments.

services.title: Pre-Construction Services
services.description: Start your project right with our comprehensive pre-construction services. We provide detailed feasibility studies, accurate cost estimating, value engineering, and comprehensive project planning. Our pre-construction expertise helps identify potential issues early and ensures smooth project execution.

content.title: How We Deliver Excellence
content.subtitle: Our proven methodology ensures every project succeeds

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: We meet to understand your vision, requirements, and budget. We discuss your goals, timeline, and any specific needs for your project.

steps.title: Design Development
steps.description: Our architects and engineers create detailed plans and 3D renderings. We refine the design until it perfectly matches your vision.

steps.title: Proposal & Contract
steps.description: We provide a detailed proposal with transparent pricing. Once approved, we execute contracts and begin pre-construction planning.

steps.title: Construction Execution
steps.description: Our skilled teams build your project with daily supervision, quality checks, and regular progress updates.

steps.title: Final Delivery
steps.description: We conduct final inspections, address any punch list items, and hand over your completed project with all documentation.

content.title: Featured Projects
content.subtitle: Showcasing our most impactful and innovative construction projects

projects.title: Metro Business Center
projects.description: A 45-story LEED Platinum certified mixed-use tower in the heart of downtown. Features 800,000 sq ft of premium office space, 150,000 sq ft of retail, and a 500-space underground parking garage. Completed three months ahead of schedule.

testimonial.quote: BuildRight exceeded every expectation. The quality of work and attention to detail is unmatched in the industry.
testimonial.author: Robert Chen, CEO, Metro Development Group

projects.title: Lakeside Luxury Community
projects.description: An exclusive waterfront residential development featuring 52 custom luxury homes ranging from 4,000 to 12,000 sq ft. Each home features premium finishes, smart home integration, and private docks. The community includes a private clubhouse, tennis courts, and a marina.

testimonial.quote: BuildRight created a masterpiece community. The craftsmanship and attention to detail in every home is extraordinary.
testimonial.author: Patricia Williams, Developer, Lakeside Development LLC

projects.title: Precision Manufacturing Plant
projects.description: A 400,000 sq ft state-of-the-art semiconductor manufacturing facility featuring Class 10 clean rooms, advanced HVAC systems, and redundant power infrastructure. The facility includes a 50,000 sq ft R&D center and employee amenities building.

testimonial.quote: BuildRight's expertise in complex industrial construction is unmatched. They delivered a world-class facility on time and on budget.
testimonial.author: Dr. James Morrison, VP Operations, Precision Tech

projects.title: Heritage Medical Center
projects.description: A new 250-bed acute care hospital featuring 12 operating rooms, emergency department, and comprehensive diagnostic services. The project included specialized MEP systems, medical gas infrastructure, and infection control measures throughout.

testimonial.quote: BuildRight understood the unique requirements of healthcare construction. They delivered a facility that exceeds all regulatory standards.
testimonial.author: Dr. Maria Gonzalez, CEO, Heritage Health System

faq.title: FAQ
faq.metaDescription: Find answers to common questions about our construction services, process, pricing, and more.

content.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
content.subheadline: Find answers to common questions about our construction services

faqs.question: How do I get started with a construction project?
faqs.answer: Getting started is easy! First, contact us through our website or call us at (555) 123-4567 to schedule a free consultation. We'll discuss your project vision, requirements, and budget. Following the consultation, we'll prepare a detailed proposal including scope of work, timeline, and pricing. Once you approve the proposal, we begin the design and pre-construction phase.

faqs.question: What types of construction projects do you handle?
faqs.answer: We handle a wide range of construction projects including: custom residential homes, luxury estates, townhouses and multi-family developments, commercial office buildings, retail centers, industrial facilities, warehouses, manufacturing plants, and renovation/remodeling projects. No project is too big or too small for our experienced team.

faqs.question: How long does a typical construction project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope, complexity, and size. A custom home typically takes 8-18 months, while commercial projects range from 12-48 months. During our initial consultation, we provide a detailed timeline specific to your project. We use advanced project management techniques to ensure on-time delivery—98% of our projects are completed on or before the scheduled completion date.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several preferred lending partners who specialize in construction financing. We can connect you with lenders offering construction-to-permanent loans, renovation loans, and commercial construction financing. Our team can help you understand your financing options and guide you through the pre-approval process.

faqs.question: How do you handle project pricing and budgets?
faqs.answer: We provide transparent, detailed proposals with itemized costs. Our estimates include all labor, materials, permits, and project management fees. We use fixed-price contracts so there are no surprise costs during construction. Any changes to scope are documented with change orders. We also offer value engineering options to help meet budget requirements without compromising quality.

faqs.question: What warranties do you provide?
faqs.answer: We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties: 10-year structural warranty on all new construction, 2-year warranty on systems (HVAC, electrical, plumbing), 1-year warranty on workmanship and materials. We also pass through all manufacturer warranties on appliances and fixtures. Our warranties are backed by our reputation for quality and customer service.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, BuildRight Construction is fully licensed in all states where we operate. We carry comprehensive general liability insurance ($5M), workers' compensation insurance, and builder's risk insurance for every project. We can provide certificates of insurance upon request and are happy to discuss our coverage in detail during your consultation.

faqs.question: How do you ensure quality during construction?
faqs.answer: Quality is built into every phase of our process. We have a dedicated quality control team that conducts inspections at critical milestones. Our project superintendents perform daily quality checks. We use only premium materials from trusted suppliers. All work is performed by our skilled employees or vetted subcontractors. We encourage client walkthroughs at key phases.

faqs.question: Can you help with design and architecture?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We have in-house architects and designers who can create custom plans for your project. We also work seamlessly with outside architects if you already have plans. Our design-build approach ensures that the construction team is involved early, preventing costly changes during construction and ensuring your vision is executable within budget.

faqs.question: What safety measures do you implement on job sites?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. Every site has a dedicated safety plan and daily safety briefings. All workers complete OSHA 30-hour training. We provide all necessary PPE and enforce strict safety protocols. Our sites have zero-tolerance policies for unsafe conditions. We maintain a 99.9% safety record and have been recognized with industry safety awards.

faqs.question: Do you offer sustainable or green building options?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're a LEED-certified construction company with experience building to various green standards including LEED, Passive House, and Net Zero. We offer sustainable material options, energy-efficient systems, solar integration, and green building consulting. Many of our clients choose sustainable features to reduce operating costs and environmental impact.

faqs.question: How do you handle project communication?
faqs.answer: We believe in transparent, regular communication. Every project gets a dedicated project manager available via phone, email, or our client portal. We provide weekly progress reports with photos. We schedule regular site meetings and walkthroughs. Our online portal gives you 24/7 access to schedules, documents, and photos. Emergency contacts are available outside business hours.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Our privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: BuildRight Construction ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.text: We may collect personal information including: name, email address, phone number, mailing address, project details, and payment information when you request quotes, contact us, or use our services.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.text: We use your information to: provide construction services, communicate about your project, process payments, send marketing communications (with your consent), improve our services, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.heading: Information Sharing
sections.text: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with: service providers who assist our operations, legal authorities when required by law, and business partners with your consent.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.text: You have the right to: access your personal information, request correction of inaccurate data, request deletion of your data, opt-out of marketing communications, and lodge complaints with data protection authorities.

sections.heading: Contact Us
sections.text: For questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at privacy@buildright.com or call (555) 123-4567.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Our terms of service and legal agreements for using our website and construction services.

sections.heading: Agreement to Terms
sections.text: By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access our services.

sections.heading: Construction Services
sections.text: All construction services are governed by separate written contracts that detail scope, pricing, timeline, and specific terms. These Terms of Service apply to website use and general service inquiries.

sections.heading: Quote Requests and Estimates
sections.text: Quotes provided through our website are estimates based on information provided. Final pricing is determined after detailed site assessment and project scope definition. Quotes are valid for 30 days unless otherwise specified.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.text: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and designs, is the property of BuildRight Construction and protected by copyright and trademark laws. You may not use our content without written permission.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.text: BuildRight Construction shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of our website or services.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes are effective immediately upon posting to this page. Your continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of revised terms.

sections.heading: Contact Information
sections.text: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at legal@buildright.com or call (555) 123-4567.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.metaDescription: Learn about how we use cookies and similar technologies on our website.

sections.heading: What Are Cookies
sections.text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit websites. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.

sections.heading: How We Use Cookies
sections.text: We use cookies to: remember your preferences and settings, understand how you use our website, improve website functionality, provide personalized content, and analyze website traffic and performance.

sections.heading: Types of Cookies We Use
sections.text: Essential Cookies: Required for basic website functionality. Analytics Cookies: Help us understand website usage. Preference Cookies: Remember your settings. Marketing Cookies: Used to deliver relevant advertisements.

sections.heading: Managing Cookies
sections.text: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or delete existing cookies. Please note that disabling cookies may affect website functionality.

sections.heading: Third-Party Cookies
sections.text: We may allow third-party service providers to place cookies on your device for analytics and advertising purposes. These third parties include Google Analytics and social media platforms.

sections.heading: Changes to This Policy
sections.text: We may update this Cookie Policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

sections.heading: Contact Us
sections.text: For questions about our Cookie Policy, contact us at privacy@buildright.com.
